category: Using The Vendor Neutral Contingency And Ras Auxiliary File
description: Add Contingency to RAS memory model This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = addcontingency(ctgname, category, skip, memo)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: A comma delimited list of strings representing the contingency categories assigned to this contingency. (input).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Set to “yes” and a contingency processor will ignore this contingency. (input; NO by default).
